response.processed:
ContactList: w 30%, bg $surface-bg

ContactDetails: gap $md-gap, w 70%, pad $lg-pad

Row h full
  ContactList
    each $contact in $contacts
      - Item bg $selected-contact-id === $contact-id ? $primary-bg : $surface-bg
        onclick: assign $selected to $contact
        Avatar "$contact.avatar"
        Text
          Text $contact.name
  ContactDetails
